response:
```sql
WITH monthly_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS signup_month,
    COUNT(id) AS num_users
  FROM
    users
  GROUP BY
    signup_month
),
lagged_counts AS (
  SELECT
    signup_month,
    num_users,
    LAG(num_users, 1) OVER (ORDER BY signup_month) AS prev_month_users
  FROM
    monthly_counts
)
SELECT
  signup_month,
  (num_users - prev_month_users) * 100.0 / prev_month_users AS month_over_month_growth
FROM
  lagged_counts
ORDER BY
  signup_month;
```
